formulas.name: First Equation of Motion
formulas.desc: Final velocity equals initial velocity plus acceleration times time.

formulas.name: Time of Flight
formulas.desc: Total time projectile is in air.

formulas.name: Newton's Second Law
formulas.desc: Net force equals mass times acceleration.

formulas.name: Friction Force
formulas.desc: Friction equals coefficient times normal reaction.

formulas.name: Work Done
formulas.desc: Work equals force times displacement times cosine of angle.

formulas.name: Work-Energy Theorem
formulas.desc: Net work equals change in kinetic energy.

formulas.name: Moment of Inertia
formulas.desc: Sum of mass times square of distance from axis.

formulas.name: Rotational KE
formulas.desc: Kinetic energy of a rotating body.

formulas.name: Parallel Axis Theorem
formulas.desc: Moment of inertia about any parallel axis.

formulas.name: Escape Velocity
formulas.desc: Minimum speed to escape gravitational pull.

formulas.name: Kepler's Third Law
formulas.desc: Square of time period proportional to cube of semi-major axis.

formulas.name: Resistivity
formulas.desc: Resistance depends on material, length and area.

formulas.name: Kirchhoff's Voltage Law
formulas.desc: Sum of all voltages in a closed loop is zero.

formulas.name: Wheatstone Bridge
formulas.desc: Balance condition of a Wheatstone bridge.

formulas.name: Faraday's Law
formulas.desc: Induced EMF equals rate of change of flux.

formulas.name: Magnetic Flux
formulas.desc: Flux through a surface in a magnetic field.

formulas.name: Motional EMF
formulas.desc: EMF induced by a conductor moving in a field.

formulas.name: Simple Pendulum Period
formulas.desc: Time period of a simple pendulum.

formulas.name: Doppler Effect
formulas.desc: Apparent frequency change due to relative motion.

formulas.name: Beat Frequency
formulas.desc: Difference in frequencies of two sources.

formulas.name: Snell's Law
formulas.desc: Law of refraction at interface of two media.

formulas.name: Mirror Formula
formulas.desc: Relation between focal length, image and object distance.

formulas.name: Magnification
formulas.desc: Ratio of image distance to object distance.

formulas.name: Lensmaker's Equation
formulas.desc: Focal length in terms of radii of curvature.

formulas.name: Diode Equation
formulas.desc: Current through a p-n junction diode.

formulas.name: First Law
formulas.desc: Change in internal energy equals heat minus work.

formulas.name: Ideal Gas Law
formulas.desc: Equation of state for ideal gas.

formulas.name: Efficiency of Heat Engine
formulas.desc: Carnot efficiency between temperatures T₁ and T₂.

formulas.name: Specific Heat
formulas.desc: Heat absorbed related to mass, specific heat and temp change.

formulas.name: Electric Field
formulas.desc: Electric field due to a point charge.

formulas.name: Electric Potential
formulas.desc: Potential due to a point charge.

formulas.name: First Law
formulas.desc: Change in internal energy equals heat added plus work done.

formulas.name: Entropy
formulas.desc: Entropy change equals reversible heat over temperature.

formulas.name: Faraday's First Law
formulas.desc: Mass deposited proportional to charge passed.

formulas.name: Gibbs-EMF Relation
formulas.desc: Relates Gibbs free energy to cell EMF.

formulas.name: Rate Law
formulas.desc: Rate depends on concentration raised to reaction orders.

formulas.name: First Order Half-life
formulas.desc: Half-life of a first order reaction.

formulas.name: Arrhenius Equation
formulas.desc: Rate constant depends on activation energy and temperature.

formulas.name: Molarity
formulas.desc: Moles of solute per litre of solution.

formulas.name: Molality
formulas.desc: Moles of solute per kg of solvent.

formulas.name: Raoult's Law
formulas.desc: Partial pressure equals mole fraction times pure vapour pressure.

formulas.name: Elevation of Boiling Point
formulas.desc: Boiling point elevation due to solute.

formulas.name: Energy of nth Orbit
formulas.desc: Energy of electron in nth orbit of hydrogen.

formulas.name: Rydberg Formula
formulas.desc: Wavelength of spectral lines in hydrogen.

formulas.name: Equilibrium Constant Kc
formulas.desc: Ratio of product to reactant concentrations at equilibrium.

formulas.name: Relation Kp and Kc
formulas.desc: Kp relates to Kc via gas constant and moles change.

formulas.name: pH Definition
formulas.desc: Negative log of hydrogen ion concentration.

formulas.name: Ionic Product of Water
formulas.desc: Product of H⁺ and OH⁻ concentrations at 25°C.

formulas.name: Density of Crystal
formulas.desc: Z = atoms per unit cell, a = edge length.

formulas.name: Freundlich Isotherm
formulas.desc: Amount adsorbed as function of pressure.

formulas.name: Product Rule
formulas.desc: Derivative of a product of two functions.

formulas.name: Integration by Parts
formulas.desc: Used when integrand is a product.

formulas.name: Definite Integral
formulas.desc: Area under curve from a to b.

formulas.name: Section Formula
formulas.desc: Point dividing a segment in ratio m:n.

formulas.name: Circle Equation
formulas.desc: Standard equation of circle with centre (h,k).

formulas.name: Sine Rule
formulas.desc: Sides proportional to sine of opposite angles.

formulas.name: AP Sum
formulas.desc: Sum of n terms of AP.

formulas.name: GP Sum (finite)
formulas.desc: Sum of n terms of GP (r≠1).

formulas.name: Sum of Squares
formulas.desc: Sum of squares of first n natural numbers.

formulas.name: Probability
formulas.desc: Ratio of favourable to total outcomes.

formulas.name: Distance Point to Plane
formulas.desc: Perpendicular distance from point to plane.

formulas.name: Euler's Formula
formulas.desc: Relates complex exponential to trig functions.

formulas.name: Modulus of Complex
formulas.desc: Distance of complex number from origin.

formulas.name: Cell Theory
formulas.equation: All life = cells; cells from cells

formulas.name: Surface Area to Volume
formulas.desc: Smaller cells exchange materials more efficiently.

formulas.name: Osmosis
formulas.equation: Water moves from low → high solute conc.
formulas.desc: Passive movement of water across semipermeable membrane.

formulas.name: Phenotype Ratio (Monohybrid)
formulas.desc: F2 phenotype ratio in monohybrid cross.

formulas.name: Dihybrid Ratio
formulas.desc: F2 phenotype ratio in dihybrid cross.

formulas.name: Quantum Yield
formulas.desc: Photons required to evolve one molecule of oxygen.

formulas.name: Tidal Volume
formulas.desc: Air moved in normal breathing cycle.

formulas.name: GFR (kidney)
formulas.desc: Glomerular filtration rate in human kidney.

formulas.name: Logistic Growth
formulas.desc: Population growth limited by carrying capacity K.

formulas.name: Simpson's Index
formulas.desc: Measure of biodiversity in a community.

formulas.name: 10% Energy Law
formulas.desc: Only 10% of energy transfers between trophic levels.
